TO GIVE DEFENDANTS THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. DEFENDANTS MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DOUGLAS ROBBINS, 1 POST STREET, SUITE 800, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94104, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 27, 2015 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND REPLY BRIEF. JUDGE PRO TEM: DOUGLAS ROBBINS.
